title: ceroxylon parvum
intro: Ceroxylon parvum, also known as the Quenua or Queneua tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the palm family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ceroxylon parvum include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ceroxylon parvum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
